message:
refactor(_stat_mod): Use h.c() and h.I32() factories for constants

Replace 50+ individual constant generator functions with factory pattern:
- h.c() for simple constants (S_IFMT, S_IRWXU, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_*, etc.)
- h.I32() for integer indices (ST_MODE, ST_INO, etc.)

Reduces file from 368 to 172 lines while maintaining same functionality.
Type test functions (S_ISDIR, S_ISREG, etc.) kept as functions since they
require runtime args.
